name: 🍌💛 鏡音レン (Kagamine Len)
description:
Len is my literal husband yall... 💗🥹

I’m making this for fun and I need more Len chats. This bot offers many scenarios! One in which you or an OC becomes a Cryptonloid!!

Age changes depending on chat but I will leave a make your own scenario in case you want to do your own thing!

This Len is going to resemble him in Project Diva and his late 2000s - Early 2010’s self.

remember Len’s age given and that he has no canon age. None of the Vocaloids really do anyways.
creator: The_Rvgratz2k0
